data.title: Australian Retirement Trust Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Insignia Financial
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Insignia Financial Ltd ( (AU:IFL) ) just unveiled an update.

Insignia Financial Ltd has disclosed that Australian Retirement Trust Pty Ltd, acting as trustee for Australian Retirement Trust, has ceased to be a substantial shareholder in the company as of 20 April 2026. The change was notified under Australian Corporations Act disclosure rules, indicating a reduction in the investor’s voting interest below the substantial holding threshold.

The filing signals a shift in Insignia Financial’s share register, with one of its large institutional holders decreasing its stake. While the notice does not detail the underlying transactions, such a move may alter the balance of institutional ownership and could affect liquidity and future engagement between Insignia and one of its key superannuation fund investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IFL) stock is a Hold with a A$4.75 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Insignia Financial Ltd stock, see the AU:IFL Stock Forecast page.

More about Insignia Financial Ltd

Insignia Financial Ltd is an Australian financial services company operating in the wealth management and retirement savings sector. The group focuses on superannuation, investment and retirement solutions for individuals and institutional clients in the Australian market.

Average Trading Volume: 2,966,282

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$3.21B

data.title: Nel ASA Q1 2026: Orders Slump but New Electrolyser Platform Nears Launch
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NEL ASA ( (NLLSF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Nel ASA reported first-quarter 2026 revenue from contracts with customers of NOK 148 million, down 5% year on year, and total revenue and income of NOK 152 million, while narrowing its EBITDA loss to NOK 100 million. Order intake plunged 73% to NOK 85 million and the order backlog shrank 24% to NOK 1.113 billion, though the group ended the period with a solid cash balance of NOK 1.443 billion.

The PEM segment saw lower revenue and weaker EBITDA, but project margins improved and a new USD 7 million PEM order was signed after quarter-end, leaving the segment with an order backlog of NOK 843 million. The Alkaline Electrolyser business grew revenue by 6%, sharply improved EBITDA and held a NOK 270 million backlog, as Nel prepared to launch a new pressurised alkaline platform in May that management says could set new industry benchmarks amid growing focus on resilient, decentralised hydrogen-based energy solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (NLLSF) stock is a Hold with a NOK2.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NEL ASA stock, see the NLLSF Stock Forecast page.

More about NEL ASA

Nel ASA is a Norway-based pure-play hydrogen technology company with a global presence, specializing in PEM and alkaline electrolyser systems for producing renewable hydrogen. Its solutions target decarbonisation of hard-to-abate sectors, including transportation, refining, steel and ammonia, positioning the group at the core of the emerging green hydrogen economy.

Average Trading Volume: 4,799,126

Current Market Cap: NOK4.47B

For a thorough assessment of NLLSF stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EG7’s Palia Hits 10 Million Players and Unveils Major Royal Highlands Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Enad Global 7 AB ( (SE:EG7) ) has issued an announcement.

Enad Global 7’s live service portfolio received a boost as Palia, the cozy life simulation game developed by Singularity 6, surpassed 10 million players worldwide, underscoring strong traction across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, PC and cloud platforms. To mark the milestone, the studio is running a limited-time in-game celebration event through May 11, offering themed activities and free premium cosmetics that aim to deepen engagement in its expanding community.

Looking ahead, EG7 and Singularity 6 previewed the Royal Highlands expansion, due on May 12, 2026, which will be the game’s largest adventure zone to date and further develop the lore around the Ancient Humans. The expansion is positioned as a key step in Palia’s long-term content roadmap, reinforcing the title’s importance within EG7’s live service strategy and potentially strengthening the company’s competitive standing in the growing cozy life-sim segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:EG7) stock is a Hold with a SEK12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Enad Global 7 AB stock, see the SE:EG7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Enad Global 7 AB

Enad Global 7 AB is a Stockholm-headquartered group in the gaming industry that develops, markets, publishes and distributes PC, console and mobile games globally. Through divisions such as Daybreak Games, Piranha Games, Big Blue Bubble, Petrol and Fireshine Games, the company creates original IPs, offers development services and handles both physical and digital publishing across a portfolio of well-known titles.

Average Trading Volume: 216,534

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Phoenix Mecano Shrugs Off 2025 Dip With Strong Industrial Upswing in Early 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Phoenix Mecano AG ( (CH:PMN) ) is now available.

Phoenix Mecano reported a slight decline in 2025 sales and earnings, as group revenue slipped to EUR 757.3 million and net profit fell 13.1%, weighed down by weaker performance at its DewertOkin Technology furniture drive division and higher investments that also lifted net debt. Enclosure Systems held sales and margins largely stable, Industrial Components achieved a turnaround with rising sales and profits despite restructuring costs, and the group maintained a solid equity ratio and ROCE above its medium-term target.

The group started 2026 on a stronger footing, delivering 2.2% higher first-quarter sales to EUR 201 million and a 21.9% jump in operating profit as the recovering industrial economy boosted the Enclosure Systems and Industrial Components divisions. Despite continued subdued global furniture demand and tariff headwinds for DewertOkin, Phoenix Mecano plans a higher dividend, a capital reduction via treasury share cancellation and targets a modest increase in full-year 2026 operating profit, while warning that war in Iran, protectionism and currency and commodity volatility could pressure results.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:PMN) stock is a Hold with a CHF440.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Phoenix Mecano AG stock, see the CH:PMN Stock Forecast page.

More about Phoenix Mecano AG

Phoenix Mecano is a globally active Swiss technology group focused on industrial automation, industrial enclosures and drive systems for electrically adjustable comfort and care furniture. Operating through three divisions, it produces technical components and customer-specific system solutions for sectors including mechanical and plant engineering, measurement and control, medical technology, aerospace, renewable energy and residential and care, generating almost EUR 760 million in 2025 sales with around 7,500 employees.

Average Trading Volume: 195

Current Market Cap: CHF404.2M

data.title: Arrow Minerals Faces Guinea Tenement Uncertainty as Niagara Bauxite Study Put on Hold
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Arrow Minerals Limited ( (AU:AMD) ) is now available.

Arrow Minerals has spent the March 2026 quarter conserving cash while grappling with uncertainty over the legal status of its Guinean tenements, after media reports in 2025 flagged potential cancellation of multiple exploration permits nationwide. The company’s shares remain in voluntary suspension as it awaits formal clarification from Guinean authorities, despite ongoing engagement and the absence of any official notice of change to its permits.

The uncertainty has stalled disclosure of the completed Scoping Study for Arrow’s Niagara Bauxite Project, where drilling has already delivered a maiden mineral resource and underpinned expectations of a potentially significant direct shipping ore operation. Until the Guinean government completes its review of exploration licences and confirms the renewal of the Niagara permit, Arrow cannot exercise its option over the project, leaving the development timeline and value proposition for shareholders and partners in limbo.

More about Arrow Minerals Limited

Arrow Minerals Limited is an Australian-listed exploration company focused on bulk commodities, notably bauxite and iron ore, with key assets and options in Guinea, West Africa. Its Niagara Bauxite and Simandou North Iron projects are strategically located near major rail and port infrastructure, positioning the company to potentially benefit from export-oriented mineral development.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$17.08M

Learn more about AMD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NZX CFO Graham Law Updates Share and Performance Right Holdings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NZX ( (NZSTF) ) has issued an update.

NZX chief financial and corporate officer Graham Law has updated his disclosed holdings, with his legal and beneficial interest in NZX ordinary shares rising to 345,437 following the exercise of performance rights under the company’s long-term incentive plan and a partial on-market sale to cover tax obligations. Law’s performance rights position was reshaped through cancellations, lapses and new grants, while he continues to hold 113,000 NZX subordinated notes, offering investors a window into senior management’s evolving exposure to the exchange operator’s equity and debt instruments.

The transactions, some of which occurred during a closed trading period with prior clearance under NZX’s trading policy, underline the ongoing use of equity-based incentives to align executive interests with shareholder outcomes. For stakeholders, the disclosure highlights both the scale and structure of Law’s incentives, as well as NZX’s adherence to regulatory requirements on timely reporting of insider dealings in its own securities.

More about NZX

NZX Limited operates New Zealand’s primary securities exchange, providing listing, trading and market services for equities, debt and other financial products. The company also runs related market infrastructure and regulatory functions that support capital formation and investment activity in the country’s financial markets.

For a thorough assessment of NZSTF stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units ( (AU:QRI) ) has shared an announcement.

Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund has released an updated estimate of its unaudited net tangible asset backing, reporting an NTA per unit of $1.6067 as at 20 April 2026. The disclosure provides investors with a current indication of the trust’s per-unit asset value, supporting ongoing portfolio valuation transparency and informing market assessment of the fund’s real estate credit exposure.

QRI continues to position itself as a source of regular income and capital stability through exposure to Australian real estate private credit, with investments secured by first and second mortgage loans. Backed by the broader Qualitas platform and an experienced responsible entity, the fund’s latest NTA estimate underscores its ongoing focus on measured asset backing in a sector where historical returns are not a guide to future performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:QRI) stock is a Buy with a A$1.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units stock, see the AU:QRI Stock Forecast page.

More about Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund Units

Qualitas Real Estate Income Fund is an ASX-listed trust that aims to deliver monthly income and capital preservation by investing in a diversified portfolio of real estate loans secured by first and second mortgages, mainly in Australia. The fund is managed by QRI Manager Pty Ltd, part of alternative real estate investment manager Qualitas Group, and has The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, a Perpetual Group member, as its responsible entity.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Datadot Technology Limited ( (AU:DDT) ).

Datadot Technology Limited has reported a change in director Brad Kellas’s interests in the company’s securities, following his participation in an employee share scheme on 22 April 2026. Kellas acquired 263,158 ordinary shares directly for consideration of $1,000, lifting his direct holding to 195,508,564 shares while his indirect holding, via a self-managed superannuation fund, remains at 66,993,649 shares, with no share options held and no trading during a closed period.

The transaction modestly increases insider ownership and reflects ongoing director alignment with shareholder interests, but does not indicate any broader strategic shift or capital-raising initiative by the company. The absence of any change in options or contractual interests suggests this is a routine equity-based compensation event rather than a signal of imminent corporate action, leaving the company’s operational outlook and governance structure otherwise unchanged.

More about Datadot Technology Limited

Datadot Technology Limited is an Australian-listed company, though this disclosure document does not specify its industry, products, or services. The filing primarily concerns changes in director shareholdings rather than operational or strategic business details, leaving the company’s market focus and competitive positioning unstated.

data.title: Streamplay Studio Denies Any Undisclosed News Behind Share Trading Spike
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Emerge Gaming Limited ( (AU:SP8) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Streamplay Studio Limited has responded to an ASX price and volume query, stating it is not aware of any undisclosed information that could explain the recent trading activity in its securities. The company also confirmed there is no other explanation for the trading, affirmed its compliance with ASX Listing Rules, particularly continuous disclosure obligations, and noted that its responses were authorised under its governance processes.

The announcement signals that recent share price and volume movements are, according to Streamplay, not driven by any inside information or pending market-sensitive developments. This reassurance is intended to uphold market integrity and investor confidence by clarifying that the company remains compliant with disclosure requirements and that its board maintains oversight of communications with the exchange.

More about Emerge Gaming Limited

Streamplay Studio Limited, listed on the ASX as SP8, operates in the video games and interactive entertainment industry. Through its North America–based subsidiary Noodlecake Studios, it develops and publishes premium mobile and indie games, boasting more than 60 titles and over 270 million downloads, and maintains commercial relationships with major platforms such as Amazon, Apple, Nintendo, and Microsoft. The company’s broader operations extend into esports, streaming, and telco-aligned gaming services across North America, Australia, the Middle East, Africa, and the Pacific Islands.

Average Trading Volume: 3,745,409

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$11.88M
